**Deciding on strike announcement**

I need to determine if a document announces an upcoming strike based on the provided Italian text. It mentions a 24-hour general strike on Tuesday, March 8, with an update date of January 25, 2023. The document indicates that public transport will be affected but that services will be regular until certain times. Given this context, I should conclude that the document is indeed announcing an upcoming strike, so I'll mark isStrike as true.
